name: Sauerbraten Klopse (Sauerbraten Meatballs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix beef, milk, bread crumbs, ground cloves, ground allspice, salt, and pepper in a bowl until well combined.
2. Form the mixture into meatballs.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add meatballs and brown on all sides, about 5-7 minutes. Remove meatballs and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, add water, vinegar, ground ginger, bay leaf, and brown sugar. Stir to combine.
5. Return the meatballs to the skillet and simmer for 30 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
6. Skim off any foam or fat from the surface of the liquid.
7. In a small bowl, whisk flour with 2 tablespoons water to create a slurry.
8. Slowly stir the slurry into the skillet juices, scraping up any browned bits, until the mixture is smooth and glossy.
9. Serve the meatballs topped with the gravy over buttered noodles.
